name: hypr-agent-protal
description: hypr-agent-protal MCP only. Hyprland background screenshot, input, clipboard, and app-state bridge. Do not use the obsolete hyprcum server.

interface.defaultPrompt: Use only the hypr-agent-protal MCP server/namespace; hyprcum is the obsolete pre-rename server and should not be used. Start with list_apps. If the requested app is missing, call launch_app/open_app instead of using a shell. Then call get_app_state or screenshot with app. Prefer element_index or screenshot/window-relative coordinates. Use global target/x/y only as a low-level computer fallback.
